text: Could crayfish feel anxiety? New studies say yes. Researchers found crayfish showing signs of anxiety-like behavior when stressed. They responded to anti-anxiety drugs, similar to how humans do. But remember, this research is preliminary and still needs careful interpretation. Understanding these behaviors helps us learn about the emotional lives of animals. What do you think? Can crayfish really feel anxiety? Comment below!
